Too many kids, the games are pretty boring and low quality, there’s not much to do outside of the mid-tier games. I’d rather invest more time in lofts if i was able to be social with my friends. Like stream videos on youtube together, draw or dance and sing and play card games in loft and just make a fun area in my loft. 

I feel lofts are very under used and they lack environments. There’s so much potential in loft. Please use them more. Please integrate more with them.

I use to be able to access this app but now it now available. 

I keep getting an error code stating

Meta Horizon Worlds isn’t available to everyone yet
Check back another time. You can also try another app or explore what’s new in the Meta Horizon Store. 

What has changed to make worlds unavailable?

The Horizon worlds app is Great, myself and Many others spend 90% of our time in VR in this app.. but, it does get it's glitches from time to time 
The reason for the 4 stars instead of 5 is because of it getting shut down to creators. The games and worlds are Not the same on mobile. The whole point was to experience them in first person with the ability to react realistically. We are all Very sad that META is going in this direction.

Meta Horizons is super weird. Public lobbies are just filled with children that sound under 10 years old. Some are just kids trying to play with other kids, others are running around yelling slurs and swears. Really gross stuff. 

The worlds themselves aren’t that great or visually entertaining either. You can have a much better experience exploring VRChat. That experience is not without its own issues, but I’d rather be there.

The one positive I will say about Horizons is the cool VR concert events they have once in awhile. I’ve watched a couple and those are really neat.

reviews.review_title: I spend the most time here LOVE IT!
reviews.review_description:
So sad Meta is not supporting this app! There are so many escape rooms that are unbelievably AWESOME that so many authors have put SO MUCH time into! 

KEEP WORLDS ALIVE, PLEASE

It seems the people who don’t like worlds simply don’t know how to do closed sessions and invite their friends. It’s a shame to give an app a low rating for personal lack of skills. 

I’ve made so many wonderful, positive connections here with people from all over the world ❤️ friends who work together to solve problems. What a gift in this “real” world!

I use worlds mostly for social reasons. Ive been recomending a Quest headset to my friends for about a year now. My selling point has always been Worlds, the concerts, and the various social activities found in Worlds. I stopped recomending the Quest headset when Meta chose to scale back and give up on Worlds. That should tell you how I feel about it. If you want a gaming headset get Steam. If you want a social headset with diverse apps, get Quest. Thats my honest opinion. At least for now while Worlds is still around. Without Worlds I struggle to find a reason to choose Quest over Steam though to be honest. Worlds is the reason I chose Quest and the reason I keep coming back and using it instead of my Playstation headset.

Cause I’m a fan of vr and I have been wanting a guardians of the galaxy game on vr like meta quest 3 3s or 2. So I’m asking for a meta guardians of the galaxy game on meta quest 3 3s and 2. So please?

how can someone enjoy a world when you try to go there and the world is messing up for days ,but when you go to other worlds there okso it has nothing to do with my headset or tablet its thapp for the mobile  please make sire youll fix this part if youll want ppl to used the mobile

You have to search and hunt down the best Worlds, the search system is not great but there are tons of hidden gems! If you want to avoid ‘annoyances’ you can get together a group of friends and go to a private instance. Or if you go to highly moderated or 18+ Worlds you will have a better experience. Unfortunately the anti-social behaviour is not solely inherent in Horizon Worlds it is a symptom of a broader social issue both online and IRL. You can mute and block people quite easily that are an annoyance. Don’t let others spoil your potential great time!

You guys are shoveling brain rot and terrible ai made games down our throats and expecting us to like it. This is not an innovative “metaverse” this is for 5 year olds. It’s like they are trying to make it their main thing to do on quest. I wish we could delete it but, nope. I miss my old oculus.

I hate worlds and it offends me that it was installed on my VR without a way for me to remove it. I can't even close it out by hitting the X or by opening another app. That last update y'all did is terrible and I regret buying oculus. In retrospect I should have gone a different route. Why would y'all force this crap on the people who are paying you money?

As someone with disabilities who could no longer get around like I used to, the Meta Horizon Worlds headset experience helped me socialize in an immersive way. Plus, I was able to build my own Worlds using the VR editor because of the large screen size, no adaptations needed. I know other people with disabilities who are going to miss Horizon Worlds. VR Chat is just...different.

reviews.review_title: Worlds Has Sadly Lost It's Appeal
reviews.review_description:
Here’s a polished review you can use:

Horizon Worlds used to be one of the most fun and unique places to meet people, hang out, and actually feel like you were part of a community. It had a social magic that made it easy to get to know others, play games together, and build friendships in a way that felt natural in VR.

Since the shift toward mobile, a lot of that appeal has been lost. It is nearly impossible to play with people who are on mobile, and it is very difficult for mobile players to fully participate in the same way. The experience feels less immersive, less connected, and less like the world many of us originally loved.

What made Horizon Worlds special was not just the games or the rooms. It was the feeling of being there with other people. That feeling seems to be fading. Instead of improving the social experience, the move toward mobile has made it feel more disconnected and less enjoyable.

As one of the players who held out hope for Worlds, it has been heartbreaking to watch my friends leave for other platforms one by one. Now it feels like both VR and mobile are slowly dwindling, and the place that once felt so alive is fading away. My hope is that, when Worlds finally reaches the end of what it used to be, Meta will look back and remember what made it great in the first place: community, presence, and the simple joy of meeting and connecting with people in VR in a way that felt real.

This "game" sucks so much before it died rec room had everthing this game has and more so little people cared about this game they made it unable to be uninstalled they are trying to force this game on people its crazy meta could have used that cash to make a actual vr game development studio or just given it to vr company's for Actual exclusive games but no we are stuck with this under baked experience I'm never Playing this trash again its staying at the bottom of my library forever meta is just always going to be a soulless corporation with no real intentions to make good games anymore i miss the Asgards wrath 2 days when i had hope for vr.

I spent a little time in Horizon Worlds & every time￼ I went in, it was changed.  VR in general is aggravating because it keeps consistently changing & we are always losing the things that made us like it.  This is pointless because I read Horizon Worlds was being discontinued anyways.

I’ve had a few bad experiences, even so, I still feel this app is beneficial for those that struggle to socialize, are lonely, or are just looking to pass time. Not to mention the ability for those to express their creativity. Worlds has helped me become more confident even with my shyness. Up the age to 18 and over and it’ll be that much more of an upgrade. Children are great, it’s just not a place for their little minds, they tend to repeat whatever they hear adults say (the bad stuff lol), which causes bad experiences because I’m just not arguing with a child.

Wish I could rate this a zero It's horrible now after changes made June 15th people was using this for different reasons such as their mental, their bedridden legally blind ECT...... People have also lost a lot of money in this and creators as well...... The changes has caused so many people to have worser depression n anxiety its really sad what matter has done to loyal people 🤬🤬🤬

I see so much potential in worlds. I understand it is on the way out and am sorry to see it go. I sincerely hope the creators take the best of Worlds and find a new home. (please post a forwarding address!)

I see worlds as being like the message boards from way back when... You can have open ones and closed ones, privately hosted and public. We had great communities built! We also had a lot of the same problems, which seems to be endemic on the internet. 

Still, I would love to see worlds develop in that direction. I think the app was a little before its time so I will be waiting!

Mobile.  Mobile beam is bad for the eyes too.

In my opinion, the danger—harassment and racism—exists all over the world, not just here; if you don't like it, don't join—simple as that. For me, it's the best thing out there. If they shut this platform down, I will sue for psychological and moral damages; I want my favorite game, Kaiju Evolution, back on the headset.

Still wish we had the horizon center app or a few choices of different style homes instead of the same one and the mirror is gone out of our homes cant pich your own ovr win or bye your own. Home decore.or m furniture tvs ect that would make the game a Hella lot funner to play i would play every game just for points to bye home and items if there was a choice but the meta worlds is a great development and having fun with the create your own game part of the world definitely most have go there every day to play so 5 + star thanks hopefully you'll think about the home part and the money it could bring to meta for more down the Road food for thought.

ACTUALLY 2 stars only because of what this has now become. 5 for you to see the review. 

This place was a great place for the older crowd to hang out and spend hours building. Now it's gone to shhhh, because of catering to the younger crowd. Horizon Worlds should've been an app to download if you wanted it and never should've been imposed on everybody. Or at least let you delete the app if you didn't want it on your oculus so you wouldn't get worlds promotions over game promotions. Meta dropped the ball when they decided to do away with updating worlds. The older crowd, the ones more willing to spend money on this platform, have already decided to move platforms once it's fully mobile. The main fun thing about worlds is that you can immerse yourself in the worlds you create and be with the people you enjoy. It's a break from the real world. You can't do that on a phone. Because you've decided not to update and let it fail because it's not performing in the areas YOU want, you say forget the long hours and energy people have put into this app, forget the people who have built businesses and connections, forget the crowd who needs the oculus to enjoy getting out due to medical issues grounding them in home. Unless you're coming out with a better version of worlds, this isn't the smartest move, at least for a huge crowd of your user base.

I was really loving world so much, and it was quickly becoming one of my favorite things to do every day. But ever since they started making certain experiences in the Metaverse Mobile Only things have gotten a lot worse. The best game I had ever played in my entire life on any system was Kaiju Evolution which until recently was a VR and mobile game that you could play on the Meta app or in worlds on your VR headset. However, a week or two ago they stopped VR version of the game and it became mobile only. I refuse to play the mobile version of the game, especially because I know how amazing it is in VR. I’m hiking mad at Meta for doing this. It seems like they’re unaware that people have recently finally started getting VR headsets because when the three came out people upgraded and a lot of people are buying the quest two on eBay because they are now more affordable. I’m seeing an influx of people in the Metaverse lately and now they’re deciding to shift everything to mobile. It’s really annoying and I’m absolutely heartbroken over it. I’ve not found a game like kaiju evolution and I don’t think I ever will and I’m really mad that they decided to just put it in mobile only

reviews.review_description: Never been in there and decided to check it out for a bit and was fine as long as adults were around. Had one 14yr old, I know this cause she told me she was 14, begin to be rude and harass me earlier in my visit and the adults corrected her and she stopped. reviews.review_title: A free introduction to virtual reality
reviews.review_description: It gets a lot of rap from people who only want to play 3rd party VR games but the Horizon Worlds and its many different portals is a fantastic beginners way to explore VR for the masses. it's a shame world's will go mobile only and removing the social interaction and adventure from the general public is a terrible idea.

There is a senior center and I met people my age and we went to a few bars and then we did color tunnels that one of the fellas created. There’s also a chakra center and meditation and wellness spa. I really look forward to socializing on those days, I can’t get out…sometimes I just type in a subject like mermaids and see what kind of worlds have been created. I can’t believe how creative some of these things are and beautiful to look at. ￼ I even use VR to go to my Roblox garden and I can hear all the animals in the forest and plant plants. The winters are long here in New York and I always find something interesting to do and meet new people. People are getting hard to find. ADVERTISEMENT would help. when I say VR people look at me like I’m crazy they don’t even know what I’m talking about. ￼My only complaint is to unmute the mics in Horizon world. ￼ There was always a few grandparents standing around just chilling watching the kids play and now we cant talk…and fix red rocks. there’s no place to hang. ￼ it seems like such a social app, but there’s so much interfering in the actual social aspect.

reviews.review_title: I lost all my Instagram stickers
reviews.review_description: I like worlds but it's soo buggy that I lost almost all the animated stickers I've got for Instagram, I used to collect them for free on daily rewards but now I don't own any of them, even some stickers from games are missing

I was done with the 1st floor a halfway through the 2nd floor came back the next day.Everything's gone start over. Started second time left for the day came back.Everything gone. I will not be flying that game again which is sad cause when it worked it was fun.

The greatest thing I have ever played in the world all these games all these imagination imagination like ugh it is fun. You know how everyone was. I do too. It doesn’t matter if anyone else likes game you’re the only person who likes games.

Metas decision to go mobile with this platform is a huge disappointment. Meta has pushed VR tech so far forward with their original vision that the industry may never be the same. But the execution of the horizon worlds ecosystem has been terrible, the platform itself is amazing in VR and gave many people a creative place to socialize but how they forced it down your throat in the store and then used horizon central to "sell" the experience was severely lacking direction. Now that VR is being discontinued I have no ambition to continue to create or visit other people's creations especially not on mobile. This decision is a step backwards but with most likely boost user numbers with children... the same ones who ruined most users first social VR experience in central.
It used to be really good, but in my opinion the VR changes have taken away from the experience. I say that respectfully, as I genuinely enjoyed it before those changes were made.

It’s a very fun game but lots of glitches when loading. Not able to knock down door. Slow at loading surroundings and not showing the gems but still able to get them if you know where to go. Also no instruction in lobby how to get In the lobby if you go to the quest board, it says get Scarbro but no idea how to earn him. Also it says you get diamonds on the wall for how many houses you save. I have saved a bunch but nothing is registering.
Ive had my quest3 for 2wks n its basically a big tv I use now. Either idk what im doing, which is most likely the problem or im just not as into vr as I thought. Idk yet.

reviews.review_title: The games are mostly low rez clones of
reviews.review_description: The space is filled with filler games. The fact the mobile experience doesnt have the same restraints that the vr head set does and yet the games are still mediocre in style and graphics says alot about the underutilization of the Snapdragon architecture. Especially with the steam headset releasing soon. Meta was poised to offer better games and experiences and yet, they are probably going to lose out to steam’s hardware and loyal user base. Mobile has so many possibilities but itll probably go the way of every other mobile arcade. Meta’s team is so insular and put of touch with consumers its no wonder they are moving into data brokering and surveillance.

This is official but it sucks I had to play this because when I got my quest it was stuck in a parental download loop so I cannot get the games I want which forced me to play this snow no home Google Chrome garden gnome 40 known small town chicken bone app!!

WorldsVR used to be the greatest place for me, it has been my saving lifeline, as so many others I have met. I learned to create again, learned block script, trying to relearn type script, and making escape rooms people enjoyed. That all changed, first by taking in VR editing support away, now with the looming  indecisiveness of a VR shutdown, world has become a ghost town. The passion that it once held in so many users has faded, with a feeling of a stake to the heart, yes there is other places, but they are not the same, the partnerships, deep friendships, working groups, they are all gone. Desktop editor just doesn't support that well. I am not interested in worlds mobile, it just doesn't have the immersive experience I need. I wish it could come back, but I don't think it can.  Creator favouritism killed your ability to profit.  Thank You for the experience, I wish I could learn unity, but my short term memory issues and ADHD make that a very difficult task.

I love the games but my favorite is Kaiju Evolution.  The problem is that it's crashes and glitches often and for reasons I cannot understand,  I've been locked out by the constant glitches. It's one of the few games that entertains all ages with great graphics which a lot of the games appeared to be geared for smaller children.

I can’t open Kaiju Evolution anymore. One of the best games. I made it to the leader board.  Please bring it back to VR. I now have no reason to be in Worlds.

It’s a hassle and everybody says they hate it. Please go back to the old style layout. We would appreciate that.

I dont think you understand how important it is to some to be fully immersed into a different world. Its a lifeline.

reviews.review_description: I hate the beta world where it's reality and vr. Please get rid of it, it makes navigating annoying. The original was so much better.
I am giving 4 stars out of principle because I don't want it to go away, even though there are a boatload of improvements that can be made.   ⁵
Great way to dip your toes in the VR experience and it could be an amazing long term platform with the right functional improvements. I can’t wait to see more of Worlds
A fun place to play interesting games, hang out and make friends. Gonna be a shame if it shuts down.
Overall great game however it could use a little work and might not always be appropriate for a younger audience and feels like a ripoff of Roblox Wich is free on quest by the way

reviews.review_title: It is challenging to get in but worth it
reviews.review_description: I think it is good if you are home alone and want some company. It has interesting benefits.

BEWARE: This app does not adhere to the privacy settings and violates several laws. Disabling the microphone in the main menu does not keep the microphone disabled throughout the rest of the app experience and does not notify the user of this. Personal information was exposed despite my express actions to disable microphone use.

reviews.review_title: Worse than Roblox, maybe even the same
reviews.review_description: You know how Roblox has brainrot stuff, like t×3 sahur (Tung tung sahur), you just implemented this into VR, WHICH IS KILLING VR, BTW. Yall need to stop this. Heck, if this didn't exist, THERE WOULDN'T BE ANY BRAINROT MADNESS, WHICH WOULD MAKE VR BETTER FROM THE "67" KIDS, AND, "Do you wanna play mini games?". If anything, 1st, this is a scam, and 2nd, I think it's better to just remove the platform entirely. Speaking of "platform," IT IS JUST LIKE ROBLOX, THE SAME BRAINROT, THE SAME RIPOFF OF OTHER  GAMES, AND A STUPID PLATFORM THAT IS DYING FROM HOW BAD IT IS. Just know, the creator of this is hurting him/herself by making a total scam, your old grandma's pc's graphics that is over 100 years old, and a stupid and dead platform. This is by far the most dead platform I have come across. No wonder this platform is around 3 stars.

If I could tell you one thousand stories of how the horizon world VR (immersive headset) experience has changed our lives. Would you reconsider shutting it down? Go look at the Meta Horizon Facebook groups, where people are heartbroken by the news of Meta Horizon shutting down. I wish you were proud of the accomplishment that you’ve achieved in building this community. This isn’t a game. This has been a haven, safe space, home, and a way for people all over the world to connect, build friendships, create their own worlds and where they found parts of themselves they didn’t know were hiding away. It’s devastating for so many of us to lose the ability to build in the headset, to lose this VR environment, that has become a daily staple in our lives. ￼

toxic kids we cant delete this game ai slop kids everywhere annoying notifications who was giving this five stars ts is so ahh don't.
